reason: Successfully tested browser use feature: agent opened a browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut interface with agent list
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260710-170246-9xkr" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened with message input field
Step 3: Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was submitted and processing began (input field became disabled)
Step 4: Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed the task in 17 seconds, executing all browser tools successfully

Step 5: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". Browser is now closed." with all tool calls shown as completed (green checkmarks)
